docker exec -it $(docker ps -qf "name=kafka-dev") kafka-topics \
  --create \
  --topic account-permissions-cache \
  --bootstrap-server localhost:29092 \
  --partitions 1 \
  --replication-factor 1 \
  --config cleanup.policy=compact \
  --config segment.ms=60000 \
  --config segment.bytes=104857600 \
  --config min.cleanable.dirty.ratio=0.01 \
  --config max.compaction.lag.ms=60000 \
  --config delete.retention.ms=10000

--topic health-check \
--bootstrap-server localhost:29092 \
--partitions 1 \

docker exec -it $(docker ps -qf "name=kafka-prod") kafka-topics \
  --create \
  --topic account-permissions-cache \
  --bootstrap-server localhost:49092 \
  --partitions 1 \
  --replication-factor 1 \
  --config cleanup.policy=compact \
  --add-config compression.type=gzip \
  --config segment.ms=60000 \
  --config segment.bytes=104857600 \
  --config min.cleanable.dirty.ratio=0.01 \
  --config max.compaction.lag.ms=60000 \
  --config delete.retention.ms=10000

--topic auth-refresh-request \
--bootstrap-server localhost:49092 \
--partitions 1 \
--replication-factor 1 \
--config cleanup.policy=compact \
--config min.cleanable.dirty.ratio=0.01
